chapters.text: Christa Jesu jal’a sohchang Paul le sopi Timothy’n katoh khompiu kadeitah Philemon,
chule sopinu Apphia chule kasepai chanpi Archippus chule na-ina kikhom Houbung chengse henga chun;
i-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa a konin nachunguva lungset le lungmon um hen.
Keiman kataona a namin kaphan ka-Pathen kathangvah jingin ahi;
ajeh chu Pakai Jesu le mitheng ho jouse nangailut le naginchat thu chu kana jan ahi;
eihoa um thilpha lamdol jouse hetna hin nangma tahsan khompia Christa dinga thilbol’a ahina dingin katao jinge.
Ajeh chu nangma ngailut chu hapan kakipapin kalung monge; ajeh chu sopi nangma vangin mitheng ho alung hal’ui.
Hijeh a chu angai doltah a bol dinga nangma thupeh ding Christa a ka-ngam jeng vangin,
ngailutna jal’a tehse keima Paul Christa Jesu jal’a sohchang hi kahung taotho joh ahi;
kacha kakihen chunga kahin, Onesimus dinga kahung tao ahi;
ama hi khatvei chu nadinga phachom lou ahin, tu vangin nangma ding jong, keima dinga jong phachom thei ahitai;
amatah chu kalungtoh tah ahin, nangma henga kahinsol kit tai;
Kipana Thupha jal’a kakihenna a hi nangma tha khel’a eijenlea apan theina dinga keima kin a dinga lhoden kagot ahin;
ahivangin nangma lung hi na louvin ima kahi nom poi; naphatna chu khoh bol’a kon hilouva nangma cham chama ahinajoh dinga kati ahi.
Tonsot geiya nanei theina dinga, chomkhat dinga nakoidoh hikhat hinte;
soh bang hita louva soh sanga chungnungjo sopi deitah bang hijo hen, kei dingtah vangin ahi, ahin nangma dinga tahsaa le Pakaiya gamchenga ha hicheh ahi.
Chuti chu ahile nangman keima hi chankhompi tia neigel’a ahile, ama hi keima neilem ding sih-in analemin.
Chule ama nangma chunga suhkhel pei ahijong le ahilouva nabat aum jong le, hichu keiyan sim jengin,
keima Paul’in kakhut tah a kasut ahi, keiman sanange; hichu nangmatah ngel’in keima neibat chu neisan, tia kasei ahipoi.
Ahi, sopi, nanga konin keima Pakaiyah phatchomna nei neisahin, nangman keima Christa a neisulung hal’in.
Nasei ngai gingchatah a kahinsut ahi, kathusei akalvala phajon bol’in nate, ti kahei.
Chujongle kalhunna ding mun gotsan anakoiyin; ajeh chu nangho taona vangin nangho henga peh-in um inge, ti kakineme.
Christa Jesua kasoh chanpi Epaphras chun nasalam e;
Mark, Aristarchus, Demas chule Luke kakithopi ho hicheng hin nasalamui.
I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa milungsetna chun nalhagaovu umpi hen. Amen.
